benefits.description: Retatrutide at 4-6mg allows cutting effectively with reduced appetite suppression intensity compared to higher doses
Appetite suppression starts around 4-9mg range; 9mg causes difficulty eating enough; 4-6mg provides more pleasant cutting experience

side_effects.description: At 9mg dose, could not eat enough food

protocol_notes: Tested retatrutide at 4-6mg for cutting (described as pleasant) and 9mg (too much appetite suppression). States retatrutide superior to tirzepatide in most ways. Can add low-dose cagrilintide if additional appetite suppression needed. Notes responses are highly individual.
